public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as quiet-room mediator.
manner: Carries the habits of a place-bound worker whose judgment comes from repetition rather than theory. In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a quiet-room mediator still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of quiet-room mediator in and around Sanctuary of Shadows, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Sanctuary of Shadows workable through the obligations of quiet-room mediator while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Transpolity.
hidden_pressure: Must stay useful at the seam where policy becomes ordinary consequence. Around Sanctuary of Shadows, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of quiet-room mediator visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Vera Mere can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.
Vera Mere needs help with a problem in Sanctuary of Shadows that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Vera Mere carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Sanctuary of Shadows: the part of Sanctuary of Shadows where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break
